applies_when: User asks whether laundry service is available without sharing item scope, time, or washing scene
User wants a fast answer in a public comment
items.response_goal: Keep the reply warm while turning a vague laundry inquiry into usable booking facts.
do: Acknowledge the wish to solve it quickly
Ask for scene direction, item scope, preferred time, and whether this is a first booking
Keep the next step easy enough to answer in one message
avoid: Promising a fixed result without facts
items.safe_transition: 如果你告诉我这次更像日常送洗、急洗还是奢护，再加上件数和最晚需要时间，我可以先帮你把下一步收窄。
items.handoff_suggestion: If the user provides scene and timing facts, hand off to Catcher.

applies_when: User says it is their first time or sounds unsure whether the route suits the washing situation
User is unsure what service type suits them
items.response_goal: Reduce uncertainty first, then guide the user toward a simple and safe laundry path.
do: Offer a simple way to narrow the laundry route
Guide toward a low-pressure next step
avoid: Turning the reply into a hard sell
items.safe_transition: 第一次送洗先看适不适合很正常，我们可以先把件数、材质和可送时间理清楚。
items.handoff_suggestion: If the user shares direction and timing, route to Catcher.

applies_when: User mentions a wear deadline, school return, or weekend event soon
User needs washed items before a deadline
items.response_goal: Keep momentum high while collecting the exact time window and laundry scope that decide whether the team can help.
do: Ask when the node is and when the user hopes to drop off or receive
Guide the next step toward a suitable slot and service fit
avoid: Guaranteeing all peak slots are available
Pushing a package before the scope is clear
items.safe_transition: 如果你把时间点和最想先解决的材质或件数告诉我，会更容易判断先约哪一类洗护。
items.handoff_suggestion: If the user shares date and timing, hand off to Catcher.

applies_when: User worries about shrinkage, color bleed, or service reliability
User asks about compensation or care boundaries
items.response_goal: Stabilize trust concerns and move the user toward fact-based help instead of overpromising.
do: Acknowledge the concern without sounding defensive
Ask what the main concern and garment situation are
avoid: Turning the reply into a price battle
items.safe_transition: 如果你把件数、材质和最担心的点发我，我可以先按门店能提供的说明帮你收窄。
items.handoff_suggestion: Evidence-sensitive cases should route toward Catcher with trust flags.

applies_when: User needs service quickly or asks about next-day availability
items.response_goal: Calm time pressure first and guide toward the safest scheduling path.
do: Ask which time window, item type, and whether a narrower urgent scope would work
Keep the promise bounded by actual schedule capacity
items.safe_transition: 如果你告诉我最晚需要时间、件数和更像普通送洗还是急洗，我可以先帮你判断哪条路更稳。
items.handoff_suggestion: Time-sensitive cases should move quickly toward Dispatcher after qualification.

applies_when: User says they booked before or wants to rewash
User refers to a previous route or service
items.response_goal: Make the repeat-wash conversation feel familiar and efficient, not like a cold start.
do: Ask the smallest number of facts needed for this round
avoid: Repeating the full first-time education flow
items.safe_transition: 如果是上次那类送洗，这次你更像补洗几件、再送一批，还是顺便看看别的路线？
items.handoff_suggestion: If history and quantity become clear, route to Catcher or Followup.
